# nest-temporal — Complete API Reference for LLMs

> Use this file when generating code that imports from `nest-temporal`.
> All public exports come from the single entry point: `import { ... } from 'nest-temporal';`

---

## 1. Module Registration

### TemporalModule.forRoot(options?)

Register the module with static config. Call once in your root AppModule.

```typescript
import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TemporalModule } from 'nest-temporal';

@Module({
  imports: [
    TemporalModule.forRoot({
      address: 'localhost:7233',    // default: 'localhost:7233'
      namespace: 'default',         // default: 'default'
      enableWorker: true,           // default: true — set false for client-only mode
      workerDefaults: {
        maxCachedWorkflows: 100,
        maxConcurrentActivityTaskExecutions: 10,
      },
    }),
  ],
})
export class AppModule {}
```

### TemporalModule.forRootAsync(options)

Register with async factory (for ConfigService injection):

```typescript
import { ConfigModule, ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';
import { TemporalModule } from 'nest-temporal';

TemporalModule.forRootAsync({
  imports: [ConfigModule],
  inject: [ConfigService],
  useFactory: (config: ConfigService) => ({
    address: config.get('TEMPORAL_ADDRESS', 'localhost:7233'),
    namespace: config.get('TEMPORAL_NAMESPACE', 'default'),
    enableWorker: config.get('ENABLE_WORKER') === 'true',
  }),
})
```

### TemporalModule.registerClient(taskQueue)

Register a task-queue-scoped WorkflowClient. Like BullModule.registerQueue().

```typescript
// String form
TemporalModule.registerClient('orders')

// Object form
TemporalModule.registerClient({ taskQueue: 'orders' })

// Multiple queues
@Module({
  imports: [
    TemporalModule.forRoot({ address: 'localhost:7233' }),
    TemporalModule.registerClient('orders'),
    TemporalModule.registerClient('notifications'),
    TemporalModule.registerClient('billing'),
  ],
})
export class AppModule {}
```

---

## 2. Interfaces (Type Signatures)

### TemporalModuleOptions

```typescript
interface TemporalModuleOptions {
  address?: string;                  // default: 'localhost:7233'
  namespace?: string;                // default: 'default'
  enableWorker?: boolean;            // default: true
  tls?: TemporalTlsOptions;
  workerDefaults?: {
    maxCachedWorkflows?: number;
    maxConcurrentActivityTaskExecutions?: number;
    maxConcurrentWorkflowTaskExecutions?: number;
  };
}
```

### TemporalModuleAsyncOptions

```typescript
interface TemporalModuleAsyncOptions extends Pick<ModuleMetadata, 'imports'> {
  useFactory: (...args: unknown[]) => Promise<TemporalModuleOptions> | TemporalModuleOptions;
  inject?: Array<Type<unknown> | string | symbol>;
}
```

### TemporalTlsOptions

```typescript
interface TemporalTlsOptions {
  clientCertPair?: { crt: Buffer; key: Buffer };
  serverRootCACertificate?: Buffer;
  serverNameOverride?: string;
}
```

### TemporalWorkerOptions

```typescript
interface TemporalWorkerOptions {
  taskQueue: string;                             // required
  workflowsPath: string;                         // required — use require.resolve()
  maxCachedWorkflows?: number;
  maxConcurrentActivityTaskExecutions?: number;
  maxConcurrentWorkflowTaskExecutions?: number;
}
```

### ActivityOptions

```typescript
interface ActivityOptions {
  name?: string;    // override activity name; defaults to method name
}
```

### WorkflowStartOptions

```typescript
interface WorkflowStartOptions {
  workflowId: string;    // unique workflow ID
  args?: unknown[];      // arguments to workflow function; default: []
}
```

---

## 3. Decorators

### @Worker(options: TemporalWorkerOptions) — class decorator

Marks a class as a Temporal activity host. Its @Activity() methods are auto-discovered.

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { Worker, Activity } from 'nest-temporal';

@Worker({
  taskQueue: 'order-processing',
  workflowsPath: require.resolve('./workflows/order.workflow'),
})
@Injectable()
export class OrderActivities {
  constructor(private readonly payments: PaymentService) {} // DI works

  @Activity()
  async chargePayment(orderId: string, amount: number) {
    return this.payments.charge(orderId, amount);
  }

  @Activity({ name: 'refundPayment' })
  async handleRefund(orderId: string) {
    return this.payments.refund(orderId);
  }

  // NOT registered — no @Activity() decorator
  private formatReceipt(orderId: string) { ... }
}
```

IMPORTANT: The @Worker() class must also be decorated with @Injectable() and registered as a NestJS provider.

### @Activity(options?: ActivityOptions) — method decorator

Marks a method as a Temporal activity. Only works on methods inside a @Worker() class.

```typescript
@Activity()                           // registered as 'myMethod'
async myMethod() { ... }

@Activity({ name: 'customName' })     // registered as 'customName'
async myMethod() { ... }
```

### @InjectWorkflowClient(taskQueue: string) — parameter/property decorator

Injects a task-queue-scoped WorkflowClient. Equivalent to @InjectQueue() from BullMQ.

PREREQUISITE: TemporalModule.registerClient(taskQueue) must be called in the module imports.

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectWorkflowClient, WorkflowClient } from 'nest-temporal';

@Injectable()
export class OrderService {
  constructor(
    @InjectWorkflowClient('orders') private readonly orders: WorkflowClient,
  ) {}
}
```

---

## 4. Services

### TemporalClientService — global client

Available after TemporalModule.forRoot(). No extra registration needed.

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TemporalClientService } from 'nest-temporal';

@Injectable()
export class MyService {
  constructor(private readonly temporal: TemporalClientService) {}
}
```

Methods:

```typescript
class TemporalClientService {
  getClient(): Client;
  startWorkflow<T extends Workflow>(workflowType: string, workflowId: string, args: unknown[], taskQueue: string): Promise<WorkflowHandle<T>>;
  getWorkflowHandle(workflowId: string): Promise<WorkflowHandle>;
  queryWorkflow<T = unknown>(workflowId: string, queryType: string, ...args: unknown[]): Promise<T>;
  signalWorkflow(workflowId: string, signalName: string, ...args: unknown[]): Promise<void>;
  cancelWorkflow(workflowId: string): Promise<void>;
  terminateWorkflow(workflowId: string, reason?: string): Promise<void>;
  getWorkflowResult<T = unknown>(workflowId: string): Promise<T>;
  getWorkflowStatus(workflowId: string): Promise<{ status: string; runId: string }>;
}
```

Full example:

```typescript
@Injectable()
export class OrderService {
  constructor(private readonly temporal: TemporalClientService) {}

  async placeOrder(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
    const handle = await this.temporal.startWorkflow(
      'OrderWorkflow',          // workflow function name
      `order-${orderId}`,       // unique workflow ID
      [orderId, email, amount], // args array
      'order-processing',       // task queue
    );
    return { workflowId: handle.workflowId };
  }

  async getOrderStatus(orderId: string) {
    return this.temporal.getWorkflowStatus(`order-${orderId}`);
  }

  async cancelOrder(orderId: string) {
    return this.temporal.cancelWorkflow(`order-${orderId}`);
  }
}
```

### WorkflowClient — task-queue-scoped client

Injected via @InjectWorkflowClient(). Pre-bound to a specific task queue.

Methods:

```typescript
class WorkflowClient {
  readonly taskQueue: string;
  start<T extends Workflow>(workflowType: string, options: WorkflowStartOptions): Promise<WorkflowHandle<T>>;
  execute<T = unknown>(workflowType: string, options: WorkflowStartOptions): Promise<T>;
  getHandle(workflowId: string): Promise<WorkflowHandle>;
  query<T = unknown>(workflowId: string, queryType: string, ...args: unknown[]): Promise<T>;
  signal(workflowId: string, signalName: string, ...args: unknown[]): Promise<void>;
  cancel(workflowId: string): Promise<void>;
  terminate(workflowId: string, reason?: string): Promise<void>;
  result<T = unknown>(workflowId: string): Promise<T>;
  describe(workflowId: string): Promise<{ status: string; runId: string }>;
}
```

Full example:

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectWorkflowClient, WorkflowClient } from 'nest-temporal';

@Injectable()
export class OrderService {
  constructor(
    @InjectWorkflowClient('order-processing')
    private readonly orders: WorkflowClient,
  ) {}

  async placeOrder(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
    const handle = await this.orders.start('OrderWorkflow', {
      workflowId: `order-${orderId}`,
      args: [orderId, email, amount],
    });
    return { workflowId: handle.workflowId };
  }

  // start + wait for result in one call
  async placeOrderSync(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
    return this.orders.execute<{ success: boolean }>('OrderWorkflow', {
      workflowId: `order-${orderId}`,
      args: [orderId, email, amount],
    });
  }

  async getOrderStatus(orderId: string) {
    return this.orders.describe(`order-${orderId}`);
  }

  async cancelOrder(orderId: string) {
    return this.orders.cancel(`order-${orderId}`);
  }

  async signalOrder(orderId: string) {
    return this.orders.signal(`order-${orderId}`, 'approvePayment', true);
  }
}
```

### TemporalWorkerService — worker lifecycle (rarely used directly)

```typescript
class TemporalWorkerService {
  getWorker(taskQueue: string): Worker | undefined;
  getRegisteredTaskQueues(): string[];
  shutdownWorker(taskQueue: string): Promise<void>;
}
```

---

## 5. Helper Functions

### getWorkflowClientToken(taskQueue: string): string

Returns the DI token for a task-queue-scoped WorkflowClient. Needed for testing.

```typescript
import { getWorkflowClientToken } from 'nest-temporal';

const token = getWorkflowClientToken('orders');
// → 'TEMPORAL_WORKFLOW_CLIENT:orders'
```

---

## 6. Workflows (standard Temporal — no nest-temporal decorators)

Workflows run in Temporal's sandboxed V8 isolate. They cannot use NestJS DI or import nest-temporal.
They reference activities by name via proxyActivities().

```typescript
// workflows/order.workflow.ts
import { proxyActivities } from '@temporalio/workflow';

const { chargePayment, sendConfirmationEmail, refundPayment } = proxyActivities({
  startToCloseTimeout: '30s',
  retry: { maximumAttempts: 3 },
});

export async function OrderWorkflow(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
  await chargePayment(orderId, amount);
  await sendConfirmationEmail(orderId, email);
  return { success: true, orderId };
}
```

The activity names in proxyActivities must match the method names (or @Activity({ name }) overrides) from your @Worker() classes.

---

## 7. Testing Patterns

### Mocking TemporalClientService

```typescript
import { Test } from '@nestjs/testing';
import { TemporalClientService } from 'nest-temporal';

const module = await Test.createTestingModule({
  providers: [
    OrderService,
    {
      provide: TemporalClientService,
      useValue: {
        startWorkflow: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ workflowId: 'wf-1' }),
        getWorkflowStatus: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ status: 'RUNNING', runId: 'run-1' }),
        cancelWorkflow: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),
      },
    },
  ],
}).compile();
```

### Mocking WorkflowClient (scoped)

```typescript
import { Test } from '@nestjs/testing';
import { getWorkflowClientToken, WorkflowClient } from 'nest-temporal';

const module = await Test.createTestingModule({
  providers: [
    OrderService,
    {
      provide: getWorkflowClientToken('orders'),
      useValue: {
        start: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ workflowId: 'order-1' }),
        execute: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ success: true }),
        cancel: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),
        describe: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ status: 'RUNNING', runId: 'run-1' }),
        signal: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),
      } as Partial<WorkflowClient>,
    },
  ],
}).compile();
```

---

## 8. Complete End-to-End Example

### app.module.ts

```typescript
import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TemporalModule } from 'nest-temporal';
import { OrderModule } from './order/order.module';

@Module({
  imports: [
    TemporalModule.forRoot({
      address: 'localhost:7233',
      namespace: 'default',
    }),
    TemporalModule.registerClient('order-processing'),
    OrderModule,
  ],
})
export class AppModule {}
```

### order/order.activities.ts

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { Worker, Activity } from 'nest-temporal';
import { PaymentService } from './payment.service';

@Worker({
  taskQueue: 'order-processing',
  workflowsPath: require.resolve('./order.workflow'),
})
@Injectable()
export class OrderActivities {
  constructor(private readonly payments: PaymentService) {}

  @Activity()
  async chargePayment(orderId: string, amount: number) {
    return this.payments.charge(orderId, amount);
  }

  @Activity()
  async sendConfirmation(orderId: string, email: string) {
    // send email...
    return { sent: true };
  }
}
```

### order/order.workflow.ts

```typescript
import { proxyActivities } from '@temporalio/workflow';

const { chargePayment, sendConfirmation } = proxyActivities({
  startToCloseTimeout: '30s',
});

export async function OrderWorkflow(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
  await chargePayment(orderId, amount);
  await sendConfirmation(orderId, email);
  return { success: true };
}
```

### order/order.service.ts

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectWorkflowClient, WorkflowClient } from 'nest-temporal';

@Injectable()
export class OrderService {
  constructor(
    @InjectWorkflowClient('order-processing')
    private readonly orders: WorkflowClient,
  ) {}

  async placeOrder(orderId: string, email: string, amount: number) {
    return this.orders.start('OrderWorkflow', {
      workflowId: `order-${orderId}`,
      args: [orderId, email, amount],
    });
  }

  async getStatus(orderId: string) {
    return this.orders.describe(`order-${orderId}`);
  }
}
```

### order/order.module.ts

```typescript
import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
import { OrderActivities } from './order.activities';
import { OrderService } from './order.service';
import { PaymentService } from './payment.service';

@Module({
  providers: [OrderActivities, OrderService, PaymentService],
  exports: [OrderService],
})
export class OrderModule {}
```

---

## 9. Common Mistakes to Avoid

1. NEVER import from subpaths like 'nest-temporal/services'. Always use 'nest-temporal'.
2. @Worker() classes MUST also have @Injectable().
3. @Worker() classes MUST be registered as NestJS providers in a module.
4. Workflows CANNOT use NestJS DI. They run in Temporal's V8 sandbox.
5. workflowsPath must point to the compiled JS file. Use require.resolve() at the decorator site.
6. Activity names in proxyActivities() must match @Activity() method names or { name } overrides.
7. @InjectWorkflowClient('x') requires TemporalModule.registerClient('x') in module imports.
8. When mocking WorkflowClient in tests, use getWorkflowClientToken('x') as the provide token.
9. Multiple @Worker() classes with the same taskQueue are merged into one worker — this is fine.
10. Don't forget to pass enableWorker: false if you only need the client (no workers in this process).

---

## 10. BullMQ → nest-temporal Migration Cheatsheet

| BullMQ code | nest-temporal equivalent |
|---|---|
| `BullModule.forRoot({ connection: { host, port } })` | `TemporalModule.forRoot({ address: 'host:7233' })` |
| `BullModule.registerQueue({ name: 'audio' })` | `TemporalModule.registerClient('audio')` |
| `@InjectQueue('audio') private queue: Queue` | `@InjectWorkflowClient('audio') private client: WorkflowClient` |
| `await queue.add('transcode', { file })` | `await client.start('TranscodeWorkflow', { workflowId: 'tx-1', args: [{ file }] })` |
| `await queue.add('transcode', { file }, { jobId: 'j1' })` | `await client.start('TranscodeWorkflow', { workflowId: 'j1', args: [{ file }] })` |
| `@Processor('audio') class AudioConsumer` | `@Worker({ taskQueue: 'audio', workflowsPath: ... }) class AudioActivities` |
| `@Process('transcode') handle(job)` | `@Activity() async transcode(file: string)` |
| `job.data` | activity function arguments |
| `job.id` | workflowId (passed at start time) |
